structural_parity.description: Structural parity validation: verify all 100 SWE baseline tasks have required files (task.toml, instruction.md, Dockerfile, test.sh, verify.py, test_patch.diff, task_metadata.json) and valid metadata.

checks_per_task: task_metadata.json valid JSON with required keys
Dockerfile has FROM and ARG BASE_IMAGE directives

structural_parity.notes: All 100 SWE baseline tasks passed structural validation. Dockerfile uses ARG BASE_IMAGE / FROM ${BASE_IMAGE} to reference pre-built Docker images from HuggingFace.

eval_parity.description: End-to-end evaluation parity: build Docker image, run test.sh, verify correct rewards.
eval_parity.blocker: Docker image tarballs are stored in gated HuggingFace repo ScaleAI/hil-bench-swe-images. Requires HF_TOKEN with access to download.
eval_parity.notes: Dockerfile fixed to use pre-built images via BASE_IMAGE build arg. Runner (run_hilbench.py) handles download/load. Cannot validate without HF access.
